titleStmt.title: SII 9.552: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 552. (A.R. No. 546 of 1919.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE ARULALA PERUMAL TEMPLE IN LITTLE CONJEEVERAM, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1454, Nandana, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 12, Ā[divāra] corresponding to A.D. 1532 July 28, Sunday, f.d.t. ·42, in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records that, when the king went to Visḥṇu-Kañchi with his queen Varadādēvī and son Chika-Veṅkaṭādri and made the tulāpūrusha and gōsahasra gifts, he granted 17 villages with an income of gadyāṇas 1500 for offerings to the god Varadarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastū svasti . śrīvijeyābdudayaśālivāhanaśakhavaruśa 1454 saṁdu mēle naḍava naṁdanasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa ba 12 Ā lū śrīmāṁmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikurāyamanōbhayaṁkara pūrvadakṣiṇapaścima samudrādhīśvara bhāśege tapuva rāyara gaṁḍa śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAcutarāyamahārāyarū viṣṇukaṁcige cittaisi tāu varadādēviyarū komāra cikaveṁkaṭādri
voḍeyarū muttina tulāpurusavanu tūgi bhūdāna sahasragōdānanū māḍi nāu varadarājadēvarige samarppista ciyanāvarada sīme grāma 3 kku pa 14 saha grāma 17 ke rēkhe ga 1500 ke nayivēdya harivāṇa 54 dadhyanna harivāṇa 2 tiruvatisā harivāṇa 2 ke Aki 11 Atirasa paḍi 2 yiṣṭake biṭavanaviḷukāḍu nālkaraloṁdu neyivēdya harivāṇa 13 . dadhyaṇa 1 tiruvatisāṁ harivāṇa . Atirasa 26 yiṣṭa
nnu rāyasarāmacaṁdradīkṣitarige pālisteU �yo dharmmau Ācaṁdrārkastāyi Āgi putrapautrapārampareyāgi naḍeyaluḷadu Ī tithiyalu haṁdikerāyaru saha biṭeU kaṁnaḍa jāri satiyarāyarū biṭṭa harivāṇa 24 ke biṭavanaviḷukkāḍu harivāṇa 62 ge narasiṁgarāyaru biṭa harivāṇa 5 ke 1 . kriṣṇaSpace for about 25 letters is left blank.
rāyarū Acutarāyarū harivāṇa 14 . �yo mūru taḷigege gaḷu koṭa 12 ke Atirasa yēnuṁṭādanū rāyastarāmacaṁ(caṁ)dradīkṣitarige pālistevu �yo dharmau Ācaṁdrārkastāyāgi putrapavutrapāraṁpareyāgi naḍeyaluḷadu yi dharmake Ārobaru hānimāḍidarū vāraṇāsili kapile
koṁda pāpake hōharu mātrusaṁgā māḍidavarū .
Digital edition of SII 9.552 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
